records.heading: Harvest CI wound classification from pasted log
records.why: Convert CI text into a stable wound packet.

records.heading: Audit stable API registry
records.why: Fail before push if a stable symbol disappears.

records.heading: Render stable contract registry
records.why: Make stable imports, evidence keys, and output contracts machine-readable.

records.heading: Compile new RHP-015.2 audit surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/contract_registry.py rhp/api_surface_auditor.py rhp/ci_wound_harvester.py rhp/compact_output.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_api_surface_auditor.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_ci_wound_harvester.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_compact_output.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run API-surface and compatibility focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_014_3_autoheal_executor_dry_run.py tests/test_rhp_014_4_ci_pipeline_bridge.py tests/test_rhp_alignment_guard.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_api_surface_auditor.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_ci_wound_harvester.py tests/test_rhp_015_2_compact_output.py
records.why: Prove stable contracts remain importable before push.

display_rule: Terminal shows only this closed summary. Full command output remains in raw stream files.
